overall.description: Aerial drone footage circling a futuristic luxury residence in a tropical urban setting during a rain shower at dusk. The scene features modern flat-roof architecture with extensive glass walls and warm interior lighting contrasting with the cool, wet exterior environment. Game engine footage with cinematic atmospheric effects and dynamic weather transition.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury residential estate with rooftop pool

agents.ego_description: slowly orbiting the modern residence to capture the architectural details and landscaping at dusk

entered.detail: multi-level contemporary structure with flat concrete roof and extensive glass facades emitting warm interior light
tall palm fronds partially obscuring the view of the residence
rectangular infinity pool with blue lighting along the left side of the property
mechanical equipment and ventilation units on the flat roof
warm streetlights visible through trees in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a stabilized aerial view of a modern luxury residence at dusk. The camera slowly orbits the building, revealing a flat-roof contemporary structure with warm interior lighting contrasting against the cool blue hour sky. A palm tree occupies the foreground while an illuminated swimming pool glows on the left side of the property.

events.description: rain begins to fall, creating wet reflective surfaces on the roof and visible rain streaks in the air

agents.ego_description: continuing the slow orbit around the residence as rain begins to fall, capturing the changing atmospheric conditions

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its slow orbit, rain begins to fall across the scene, transforming the dry surfaces into wet, reflective planes that mirror the interior lights. The palm tree shifts toward the right of the frame as the drone moves, while the rain creates a moody atmosphere with visible precipitation streaks against the darkening sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial orbit around a futuristic luxury residence as a clear dusk settles into a moody rain shower. It begins with a stabilized view of the contemporary flat-roof structure, where warm interior lighting contrasts against the cool blue hour sky and an illuminated swimming pool glows beside the property. As the camera slowly circles the building, rain begins to fall, transforming the dry architectural surfaces into wet, reflective planes that mirror the golden lights from within. The scene then shifts as the foreground palm tree glides toward the right of the frame, while visible precipitation streaks intensify against the darkening sky to complete the atmospheric transition.
